title: perfoliata protracta
intro: Perfoliata protracta, also known as Bush Clover or Sticky Bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is a shrubby plant with small leaves and purple flowers, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues. Perfoliata protracta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations and promoting healing.
